column1: Ildemaro Vargas leads the slate with a strong hit probability and over 80% of games with a hit, boosted by a favorable home matchup and platoon edge against Michael Lorenzen. Ketel Marte offers similar appeal in the leadoff spot, riding a recent hot streak and the same advantageous conditions. Bobby Witt Jr. and Xavier Edwards bring steady profiles, but Vargas stands out for consistency and matchup reliability.
